**Acceptance Criteria**

No domain/storage/commands/CLI boundary violation found. The change is limited to shell gate scripts plus integration-style regression tests.

No state mutation paths were touched, so atomic writes, event logging, gate transition semantics, assignee/label formatting, and PID safety are unaffected. The “last verdict line wins” behavior is explicitly documented next to both parser copies.

No production Rust error-handling changes. Test-only `unwrap()` usage is allowed under the review rules.

**CLI Contract**

**Documentation**

No public Rust API was added, so no new API documentation requirement applies. Inline parser comments explain the changed behavior in both scripts.
